insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll be laying the foundation for a strong understanding of the material and setting yourself up for a sense of accomplishment that will propel you forward. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can build momentum and develop a growth mindset that will help you overcome initial challenges and eventually celebrate a streak of successful days.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
